headline: 348/470 maintainer-adjudicated regressions detected at the introducing PR
method: Run the shipped jrs:java-review-agent finders on the diff that INTRODUCED a bug, score recall against the defect the maintainers' later fix PR proves. Finders-only (upper-bound recall). 0 fabrications across all runs. Finder model is per-pair (see finder_model field) — batches 1–7 Opus 4.8 (n=1–70), batches 8+ Grok 4.5 (n=71+); see finder_model per pair (Grok 4.5 n=400, Opus 4.8 n=70).

notes: review_grade A/B = defect on the introducing diff's surface, C = cross-file, per evals/mined-pairs-candidates.md. 'deeper-than-fix' unadjudicated findings are deliberately NOT in these headline fields. Mis-graded candidates dropped pre-scoring are not counted. finder_model is the model that ran the finders for that banked HIT/MISS — do not mix models when quoting a single recall rate without disclosing the split.
